sections.paragraph:
Τριτογένεια (Τρῑτο-γένεια, ἡ,)
Etym. γίγνομαι

Trito-born, a name of Athena, Hom., Hes., Hhymn., Orac. ap. Hdt.


Etym. From the Lake Τριτωνίς in Libya, near which the goddess was born, Eur. Others interpret τριτογένεια born on the third day of the month, or the third child after Apollo and Artemis.
